## Production Checks

- [ ] Uses real connector data or clearly labeled captured replay
- [ ] No regex-based business extraction
- [ ] Typed inputs and outputs
- [ ] Policy checked for sensitive actions
- [ ] Human approval path where required
- [ ] Trace and audit metadata included
- [ ] Budget/rate limit considered
- [ ] Tests or evals included
